name: four-cs-bank
description: A banking application with React frontend and Flask backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm start" "cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 app.py"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 app.py
scripts.backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 app.py
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.lint:frontend: cd frontend && npm run lint 2>/dev/null || echo 'No lint script'
scripts.clean: rm -rf frontend/node_modules frontend/build backend/venv && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true

author: Zachary Critchfield
